pages.title: Wake up
pages.body_text: Good morning! Time to wake up.
pages.read_aloud_text: Good morning! Time to wake up.

dialogue.start: Good morning! Tap the alarm clock to start your day.
Nice! Now tap Mai to stretch and get out of bed.
Time for the bathroom. Tap the bathroom door.

pages.title: Bathroom
pages.body_text: Mai, Linh, and Tom sort out the bathroom before school.
pages.read_aloud_text: Mai, Linh, and Tom sort out the bathroom before school.

dialogue.start: The bathroom is quiet and a little cold. Mai rubs her eyes. Tap the light switch to wake the room up.
Linh: Do not use my pink towel—that one is mine! Mai: I was not going to! Tom from the hall: I can hear you both! Tap OK when you are ready to fix it.
Drag the pink towel to Linh so she knows you respect her things.
dialogue.error: Not there—drag the towel onto Linh's hands.

dialogue.start: Linh: Thank you. Mai: Sorry about that! Tap OK.
Listen for the bathroom jobs: wash at the sink, brush your teeth, pick up the clothes for Tom, then turn off the light. Tap OK.
First: tap the sink. Turn on the water and wash your hands. Nice—clean hands first!
Next: tap the toothbrush. Brush your teeth!
Tom peeks in: Pick up all the clothes and hand them to me—I will take them to the basket. Tap OK.
Drag every shirt, sock, and pair of shorts to Tom.
dialogue.error: Drop each piece on Tom's hands.

dialogue.start: Tom: Got them—thanks! Linh from the hall: The floor looks safe again. Tap OK.
Last: tap the light switch. Turn off the light when you leave for the closet.
All set! Tap the closet door to get dressed.
Drag the shirt, pants, and shoes onto Mai. Tap Let's dress when you are ready to try.
Drag each piece onto the matching shadow on Mai.
dialogue.error: Try another spot — match shirt, pants, and shoes.

dialogue.start: You look great! Tap the mirror to check yourself.
Time for breakfast. Tap the kitchen door.
Breakfast time! First, tap the chair to sit down.
Tap the plate to eat your breakfast.
Tap the milk to drink.
Yummy! Now tap the door to pack your bag.

pages.title: Pack and go
pages.body_text: Pack your backpack and head to school.
pages.read_aloud_text: Pack your backpack and head to school.

dialogue.start: Drag the book, pencil, and water bottle into the backpack. Tap Pack my bag when you are ready.
Put everything in the backpack.
Tap the zipper to close your bag.
You are ready! Tap the door to go to school.

learning_goals: Follow a morning routine in English: wake up, bathroom, get dressed, breakfast, pack, go.
Practice listening for short commands (tap the sink, drag the shirt) and classroom-ready phrases.
